title: RunPod multi-image build (CUDA profiles + accelerators)
description: Build a per-arch set of Cubric Vision Pod images so the app serves the correct runtime per selected card (Pattern B + multi-image). cu124 default (broad host compat, Ampere/Ada/Hopper) + cu128 Blackwell (sm_120: 5090/PRO 6000/B200), both from the same Dockerfile via a base-image ARG in the mpi-ci CI. Include per-arch accelerators (sageattention at minimum; evaluate flash-attn + Blackwell fp8/fp4) so remote gens are not slower than native ComfyUI. Volume stays models-only/arch-agnostic — no volume change. App-side card->image selection is MPI-64 Step 5.1/5.2 (separate); this card owns the IMAGES + CI only.

attention.reason: Images shipped (both tags v0.3.0 live+public+smoke-checked). Move to done only after MPI-64 confirms a live v0.3.0 Pod reached ready (live-verify in flight on cu124/L4). Gate per user decision.

activeSessionTitle: Claude implementer — MPI-70 multi-image build (parallel with MPI-64)
